note: Tiled binary scan (--batch T): each doc loaded once, compared against a tile of T queries, so the 122MB binary base streams once per tile instead of per query. Pure bandwidth win on the memory-bound box; recall IDENTICAL (exact-equivalent reordering). +73% QPS at tile=8 (485->838), saturates ~tile=16-32 (scan re-prices toward compute-bound). Composes with prefix scan-bits. Rerank=1000 f32.
